steps.title: Set up the quadratic equation
steps.content: The product of $x$ and $(x-6)$ equals $187$: $$x(x-6)=187 \implies x^2-6x-187=0.$$

steps.title: Solve and identify x
steps.content:
Factor: $(x-17)(x+11)=0$, giving $x=17$ or $x=-11$. Since $x$ is positive, $x=17$. The answer is 17.

The negative root is rejected because the problem asks for a positive value, leaving the positive factor solution only.
